category_title: Extremely shy students with social engagement difficulties
scenario_title: Structured Q&A session with visiting adults
minimal_context: The student is sitting in a classroom group forum and is expected to ask a cloze question to a visiting NRL player.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is your turn to ask your cloze question to the visiting player in front of the group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks down at her desk, remaining completely silent while the others listen quietly.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Go ahead and introduce yourself by name and school.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Shakes her head slightly, appearing highly anxious and avoiding any eye contact with the visiting adult.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You just need to use a confident voice to ask the question.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Pushes the question paper away, exhibiting work refusal, and shrinks back into her chair, struggling to even speak to the kids her own age sitting next to her.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is your turn to ask your cloze question to the visiting player in front of the group.

STUDENT: (Looks down at her desk, remaining completely silent while the others listen quietly.)

TUTOR: Go ahead and introduce yourself by name and school.

STUDENT: (Shakes her head slightly, appearing highly anxious and avoiding any eye contact with the visiting adult.)

TUTOR: You just need to use a confident voice to ask the question.

STUDENT: (Pushes the question paper away, exhibiting work refusal, and shrinks back into her chair, struggling to even speak to the kids her own age sitting next to her.)

task.content: Ask their cloze question to visiting NRL players
task.learning_goal: Socialising the students into appropriate communication with adult visitors to the classroom and respectful communication (speaking and listening) with each other

context.social_setting: Group forum with visiting player whilst others listened quietly
context.time_context: Weekly basis during classroom learning time

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When encouraged to engage with the visiting player in this group forum
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Struggled to even speak to kids her own age, exhibiting behaviours that made full-participation in the classroom difficult

behavior_patterns.condition: Prior to explicit social skills instruction and program participation
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Struggled to even speak to kids her own age
